title: lobelia cyanea
intro: Lobelia cyanea, also known as the blue lobelia or New York blue lobelia, is a flowering plant native to the eastern United States and Canada, characterized by its blue or purple flowers. The medicinal properties of Lobelia cyanea include its expectorant and antispasmodic properties, which can help relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Lobelia cyanea include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and even help manage stress and anxiety. Lobelia cyanea is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
